title: Verify Trial Corner shows top content in user's primary dialect for Trending section
description: Test that the Trending section displays shows/movies in the user's selected primary dialect
preconditions: User has selected primary dialect in profile
User is on Trial Corner Hub

steps.description: 1. Set user's primary dialect to a specific language
4. Verify content language matches primary dialect

expected_result: Trending section displays top 10 shows/movies in user's selected primary dialect
